## Summary

Describe the change and the affected workflow.

## Capture And Session Safety

- Does this affect byte-exact capture?
- Does this affect background recording?
- Does this affect receiver commands?
- Does this affect session file compatibility?
- Are tests/docs updated?

## Out-Of-Scope Check

- [ ] No maps, shapefiles or GIS editing dependencies were added.
- [ ] No RTKLIB integration was added in this bootstrap phase.
- [ ] No Android PPP/static solver was added in this bootstrap phase.
- [ ] Parser failures remain isolated from recording design.

## Validation

List the commands run and their results.
